---
name: Worked example
about: Share a shipped tool that applies the PAI pattern.
title: "[example] "
labels: example
---

## Tool

Name and link to the live tool.

## Input space

What does it answer for, and what range of inputs does the artifact cover?

## Artifact

What form is the precomputed artifact (ruleset, table, generated code, precomputed text, boundary, policy surface)? Where is it stored and versioned?

## Cadence

How often does it regenerate? What triggers regeneration?

## Coverage path

What happens on inputs the artifact can't decide — live LLM escalation, deterministic fallback, or explicit abstention? Is the path declared to the user?

## Which pattern(s) does it map to

Ruleset Compilation, Constraint Baking, Scheduled Generation, or a candidate for a new pattern.

## What surprised you

Optional. Anything you learned shipping this that the spec doesn't yet capture.
